meaning: n.小尖塔,山顶,顶点vt.造小尖塔,把...放在极高处
examples: She was still at the pinnacle of her career.
A walker broke his arms, legs, and pelvis yesterday when he plunged 80 feet from a rocky pinnacle.
He took an odd route to the pinnacle of fashion.
Pinnacle's managing director Graham Reed said this development was "a complete surprise and shock to us".
Using steel framing and high-speed elevators, they created their pinnacle achievement: the modern skyscraper.
